title: Illegal Recruitment by Licensees or Holders of Authority
content: Illegal recruitment is not committed only by those without license or authority from the POEA. A licensee or a holder of authority, when it conducts any of the prohibited acts enumerated in Section 6 of RA 8042, may be charged with illegal recruitment.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
